zh.Chipping Norton with Over Norton, Oxford: 英國英格蘭奧可福爾奧維 諾頓
zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas Huckins於1580年12月8日出生在英國奧可福爾時，他的父親John Huchins31歲，母親Ann Hutchins20歲。他於1616年10月20日與Elizabaeth Hyatt在英國格盧斯特斯爾結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於大約1630年在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼巴恩斯塔波享年51歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomas Huckins于1580年12月8日出生在英国奧可福爾时，他的父亲John Huchins31岁，母亲Ann Hutchins20岁。他于1616年10月20日与Elizabaeth Hyatt在英国格盧斯特斯爾结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。他去世于大约1630年在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼巴恩斯塔波享年51岁。

nameMeanings.name: Huckins
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Oxfordshire): from a pet form of the personal name Hew or How, with post-medieval excrescent -s (see Hugh ).

variants.name: Hugh
meanings: English, Welsh, and Scottish (of Norman origin): from the Old French personal name Hue, from ancient Germanic Hugo (ultimately derived from hugi- ‘mind, spirit’). This was a very popular name in England after the Norman Conquest, partly due to the reputation of Saint Hugh of Lincoln (1140–1200), who was born in Burgundy and who established the first Carthusian monastery in England.
Scottish and Irish: adopted as an Anglicized form of the Gaelic personal name Aodh, a derivative of a Gaelic word meaning ‘fire’. See Hughes .
Chinese: variant Romanization of the surnames 邱 and 丘, based on their Hakka pronunciation; see   Qiu   1 and 2.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas Huckins was born on 8 December 1580, in Oxfordshire, England, his father, John Huchins, was 31 and his mother, Ann Hutchins, was 20. He married Elizabaeth Hyatt on 20 October 1616, in Gloucestershire, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died about 1630, in Barnstable, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, at the age of 51.

fr.Barnstable, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Br: Barnstable, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas Huckins est né le 8 décembre 1580, à Oxfordshire, Angleterre, son père, John Huchins, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Ann Hutchins, avait 20 ans. Il a épousé Elizabaeth Hyatt le 20 octobre 1616, à Gloucestershire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé environ 1630, à Barnstable, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 51 ans.

ko.Barnstable, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Br: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 바른스타블일
ko.lifeSummary: Thomas Huckins(이)가 1580년 12월 8일 영국 스퍼드실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Huchins(은)는 31세였고, 그의 어머니 Ann Hutchins(은)는 20세였다. 그는 1616년 10월 20일 영국 그루스스터실르에서 Elizabaeth Hyatt(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 대략 1630년 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 바른스타블일에서 51세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.Barnstable, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Br: барнстабл, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas Huckins родился 8 декабря 1580 г. в местности оксфордшир, Англия, его отцу по имени John Huchins было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Ann Hutchins, 20. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabaeth Hyatt 20 октября 1616 г. в местности глоусестиршир, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер около 1630 г. в местности барнстабл, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 51 год.
